packageRules.description: Go modules and the Dockerfile base image are runtime-affecting: commit as fix: so release-please cuts a patch release and the update deploys.
GitHub Actions updates are CI-only: commit as chore: so release-please does not cut a release for them.
Auto-merge low-risk leaf-dependency updates (patch, minor, digest) once required checks are green.
Never auto-merge a major bump; always leave it as a manual PR.
